tasks.subject: Examine the PR and repo to understand the context
tasks.description: Look at the repo structure and the PR changes to understand what files are being reviewed

tasks.subject: Address all 8 review comments: remove verbose/duplicate content
tasks.description: All 8 review threads ask to remove content: templates, MCP tool lists, examples, verbose descriptions. Condense the skill files to be minimal and let the AI agent auto-discover capabilities via MCP.

tasks.subject: Fix multiline comment formatting in notifications to be single-line
tasks.description: The notification system currently outputs multiline comments which are hard to read. Find a way to make them single-line - either truncate to first line, replace newlines with spaces, or use literal \n.

tasks.subject: Commit and push changes
tasks.description: Commit changes and push to the remote branch
